brand_identity.name: DoorGuard
brand_identity.description: A premium marketplace connecting civilians with vetted combat and fitness experts. Think 'Equinox meets Private Security'.
design_principles: Trust through Clarity: Verified badges and safety features must be prominent but elegant
Dark Mode First: The app lives in the 'Shadows' (Privacy/Security)
Gamification as Rank: Belt progression is the core user journey

headings.usage: All section headers, hero text, and major calls to action. Use tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Paragraphs, inputs, data tables. High legibility focus.

accent.usage: Belt Ranks, Challenge Points, 'Verified' Badges. Uppercase only.

primary.description: Metallic Gold/Bronze. Used for 'Premium' actions, Elite Trainer badges, and primary CTAs.

secondary.description: Zinc/Slate. Used for structural elements, borders, and secondary buttons.

accent.description: Safety Blue. Used for 'Verified' badges, trust indicators, and info states.

destructive.description: Alert Red. Used ONLY for the Emergency Button and destructive actions.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-filter: blur(12px); background: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on the main background to prevent banding and add 'tactile' feel.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary-light rounded-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wide shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(192,160,98,0.3)] transition-all
buttons.emergency: bg-destructive text-white rounded-full w-16 h-16 flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(239,68,68,0.5)] animate-pulse

cards.trainer: bg-card border border-border/50 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden. Add a 'scanline' effect on hover.

belt_progress.style: Horizontal segmented bar. Active segment glows. Completed segments are solid. Future segments are outlined.

badges.verified: bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/20 text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full flex items-center gap-1
badges.elite: bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-400 border border-yellow-500/20 text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full flex items-center gap-1

hero_background.description: Close up of boxing gloves in dark lighting. Use as Hero Background with heavy overlay (bg-black/80).

features_jiujitsu.description: Two men sparring/dueling. Use for 'Self-Defense' or 'Jiu-Jitsu' category card.

features_training.description: Personal trainer helping client. Use for 'Personal Training' category card.

auth_background.description: Dojo floor/training area. Use for Login/Register split screen background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Tactical Luxury' theme by strictly adhering to the Zinc-950 background and Gold accents.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards for the Trainer Profiles. Create a custom 'Dossier' style card.
The Belt System is the core gamification. Ensure the colors (White -> Black) are accurate to BJJ standards.
Safety First: The Emergency Button must be accessible but protected from accidental clicks (use a long-press or slide interaction).
Use 'Manrope' for all headings. If not available via Google Fonts, use 'Inter' with tight tracking.
For the Dashboard, use the 'Control Room' grid layout. High density, low fluff.
Ensure all images have a 'dimming' layer (opacity-50 or similar) when text is placed over them.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' attribute.
